case_title: IBM CORPORATION VS. GRETCHEN THEKLA KAUFMAN et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT KAUFMAN, GRETCHEN THEKLA DOES 1 THRU 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-30-2012

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET, ADR INFORMATION PACKAGE, NOTICE TO PLNTF., PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBM CORPORATION SERVED AUG-08-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KAUFMAN, GRETCHEN THEKLA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-20-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBM CORPORATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-20-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
